queries.question: what are the side effects of a particular medication
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?antibiotic ?common_side_effects WHERE {
  ?medications a :Medications .
  ?medications p:antibiotic ?antibiotic .
  ?medications p:common_side_effects ?common_side_effects .
}

queries.question: what are the side effects of a particular medication
queries.sql: select antibiotic, common_side_effects, serious_side_effects from medications
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?antibiotic ?common_side_effects ?serious_side_effects WHERE {
  ?medications a :Medications .
  ?medications p:antibiotic ?antibiotic .
  ?medications p:common_side_effects ?common_side_effects .
  ?medications p:serious_side_effects ?serious_side_effects .
}

queries.question: List the medications prescribed by the neurologist and their common and serious side effects.
queries.sql: select antibiotic, common_side_effects, serious_side_effects from medications join Prescriptions on  Prescriptions.medication_id = Medications.medication_id join Doctors on Doctors.doctor_id = Prescriptions.doctor_id where specialty = 'Neurology'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?antibiotic ?common_side_effects ?serious_side_effects WHERE {
  ?medications a :Medications .
  ?prescriptions a :Prescriptions .
  ?prescriptions p:hasMedications ?medications .
  ?doctors a :Doctors .
  ?prescriptions p:hasDoctors ?doctors .
  ?medications p:antibiotic ?antibiotic .
  ?medications p:common_side_effects ?common_side_effects .
  ?medications p:serious_side_effects ?serious_side_effects .
  ?doctors p:specialty ?specialty_f .
  FILTER(STR(?specialty_f) = STR("Neurology"))
}
